properties.remarks: Due to a lapse of funding, the computation of discharge has been discontinued at MERRIMACK RIVER AT BATES BRIDGE NEAR HAVERHILL, MA as of 12/31/2025. If there are any questions, please contact Brian Loving at bloving@usgs.gov

properties.station_nm: PINNEBOG RIVER AT KINDE RD NEAR PINNEBOG, MI
properties.remarks: Station will be discontinued on Jan. 1, 2026 due to lack of funding. If interested in funding this please reach out to Matt Komiskey at mjkomisk@usgs.gov.

properties.station_nm: ST JONES RIVER NEAR MAGNOLIA, DE
properties.remarks: All data at this site was discontinued on May 20, 2025 due to a loss of funding. Although historical data will remain accessible, no new data will be collected. If there are questions concerning the operation of this site, please contact Chuck Walker (cwwalker@usgs.gov).
